_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of active directory federated services.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data governance operating models, including federated, centralized, and hub-and-spoke structures, and the organizational conditions under which each model is appropriate.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-015 (DQ, cosine: 0.487), LS-K-004 (LS, cosine: 0.462).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.480). Shared vocabulary: [federated, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [active, directory, services] vs WIDAI-only terms [appropriate, centralized, conditions, data, governance, hub] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.911, R=0.854). P exceeds R by 0.057 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of active directory federated services." and "Knowledge of data governance operating models, including federated, centralized," are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.588 > STS 0.480 (gap +0.108). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [federated, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [federated, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [active, directory, services]. WIDAI-only: [appropriate, centralized, conditions, data, governance, hub].
